package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_allocation_in_hash_or_less_func: Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag allocations inside sort comparison or hashing callbacks.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule544PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario544Positive(records []Rule544PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
